title: Pricing Analyst (m/w/d)
required_skills: Master- oder Diplomstudium mit quantitativem Schwerpunkt (Statistik, BWL, VWL, Wirtschaftsmathematik, Wirtschaftsinformatik)
Hohe analytische Fähigkeiten und strukturierte Arbeitsweise
bonus_skills: Google Looker Studio (implied from dashboard responsibility)
Google BigQuery (listed as Erfahrung von Vorteil alongside Excel)
matched_skills: Hohe analytische Fähigkeiten (matched via data-driven analytics background)
Dashboard creation / C-level data storytelling (partial match to Looker Studio responsibility)
Cross-functional collaboration with Sales/Category stakeholders (matched via Hapag-Lloyd and Minth experience)
missing_skills: SQL / BigQuery / database query proficiency (not mentioned in CV)
Google Looker Studio (not mentioned in CV)
Excel / MS Office advanced proficiency (not explicitly stated in CV)
Pricing strategy or pricing analytics domain experience
German language proficiency (not confirmed in CV)
Quantitative Master/Diplom degree in Statistics, Economics, or Informatics
core_responsibilities: Write complex SQL and Google BigQuery queries; analyse large and complex datasets; build dashboards in Google Looker Studio
Contribute to the development and further refinement of pricing strategy
Execute tool-supported pricing processes (price editing, review, and import)
Collaborate with Category Management and Sales to address pricing-specific issues
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any SQL or data querying experience, even if from academic or side projects
Emphasise dashboard-building experience (HSBC budget dashboards, Minth executive dashboards) and connect it explicitly to BI/reporting tools
Frame the Minth and HSBC analytics work in terms of large-dataset analysis and structured reporting
Stress cross-functional stakeholder collaboration with commercial/sales teams from Hapag-Lloyd CX role
Mention any pricing, margin, or revenue analysis experience, even if indirect (e-commerce ROI, campaign ROI)
